name: Cream of Cauliflower Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 can (10 1/2 oz.) Reduced Sodium Chicken Broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water and broth in a large saucepan; bring to a boil.
2. Add cauliflower; return to a boil. Reduce heat and cook 10 minutes or until tender. Remove cauliflower from broth, reserving the broth.
3. With the knife blade in the processor, add cauliflower. Pulse 8 to 10 times or until cauliflower is finely chopped but not pureed.
4. Combine milk powder, flour, nutmeg, and pepper; add to reserved broth, stirring well with a wire whisk.
5. Add chopped cauliflower and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer 15 minutes or until slightly thickened.
6. Ladle soup into six individual bowls; garnish with minced parsley if desired. Serve with lemon wedges. (Fat 0.4, Cholesterol 1.)
